arts.ttl: “Compete at big club” – Rangers player talks up transfer, insists right balance needed for him
arts.sum: Rangers’ Nicolas Raskin impressive performances at Ibrox helped him make his debut for Belgium last month. The midfielder left Standard Liège for the Scottish club in 2023 and has been a regular for Rangers this season. To put it in context, he played 3,324 minutes from 42 games and managed two goals and seven assists The post “Compete at big club” – Rangers player talks up transfer, insists right balance needed for him appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: Ibrox captain James Tavernier was part of the side that were beaten on penalties by Frankfurt in the 2023 Europa League final and he's yet to watch a re-run of the match

Barry Ferguson wants his Rangers players to emulate the side he helped captain to the Uefa Cup final in 2008 when they face Athletic Bilbao in the second leg of their Europa League quarter-final on Thursday night.
